feed.title: the42Front
feed.subtitle: Rebuilds after rebuilds. This time modernize.

entry.title: 1st class on CR/GSR’s C80xx still worth it?

link.title: 1st class on CR/GSR’s C80xx still worth it?

entry.content:
Actually this started off as an interesting test for my newly purchased ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 6.

About “does ultrabooks or something like this 14 inch ThinkPad suitable for this kinda work like typing something on a trains”.
Which btw, I di it before with X230 and A285 before, as well as M4 MacBook Air, which of course they all works out well since they’re all 13 or sub-13 inch laptops.
But my newly purchased ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 6 is a 14-inch, albeit super lightweight(lighter than all the laptops I’ve mentioned above) and super thin thanks to use of composites.
So I’ve decided to type out this whole thing, with my new X1 Carbon, on a old EMU, that charge a premium, as a test.
Okay not all of this will be typed out on a train since I am getting a bit sleepy, but you get the idea.

The whole Guangzhou-Shenzhen Intercity Express thingy.

I assume that you have some basic knowledge on how China Railway system works and have some basic idea on CR/CRH EMUs.
So this railway, first opened in 1911 connecting to Hong Kong got a speed bump and dual-rail upgrade at the turn of the century, which leveled up it’s speed to 200km/h max to suit up those crazy high-speed railway plan, and bought a tons of trains for it.
But right after the crash happened in 2012, they lowered the speed limit to 160km/h, which made it more like an old Electric head pulling 16 carriage speed but still charge you for a premium fee for the ease of transporting between two cities’ central in an hour.

Which leads us to the train I want to talk about today, the fricking CRH1A.
I used to love this dumb little train, small, runs rather snappy, and with imported parts which somehow means that it could stand against the time; which is a pro in most cases.
But the thing is this crap is nearly 20 years old at this point, not counting the platform it was based on, Regina by Bombardier.
And your honour CR/GSR charge me CNY72 on this crap of metal for 120km? nuts.
Be fair we all knew this is a huge cash cow and we could do nothing about it, and they actually speedbumped it back to 200km/h(TOP) this year, albeit It could only pull 180km/h most of the time due to the schedule table is already packed full at this point.

Oh and now I am writing this on Guangzhou Metro Line 21.

Which is quite a fun one as well, 120km/h Type-B(which means it could carry less ppl than Type-A) Metro train, running through like 50ish km of length and serve as the only connection to the metro system of two satellite towns with huge populations.(same for L14, which funny enough they share same EMUs and is connected with each other)

Whatever I am all a bit dizzy right now tbh, so I will just end this nonsense test shit here.
entry.summary: Only worth it if you have a tons of cash to burn, or your ride is powered by CRH6As.

entry.title: 7th ThinkPad in a row, this time, ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 6(2018)

link.title: 7th ThinkPad in a row, this time, ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 6(2018)

entry.content:
What specs specifically?

Additional Infos: 8th Gen i5 vPro, Non-touch Display and 720p webcam only, but thats fine.

Oh and I use aRcH btw.

Why you buy yet yet yet yet another ThinkPad, I thought you’re retired from all this after buying that M4 MacBook Air.

Well, turns out that I still need some sort of Generic x86-64 Linux portable that is power efficient(no going back after seeing how ARM MacBooks pull when doing stuff).
Naturally I first turned my attention to my good old ThinkPad A285(aka X280 with a motherboard housing AMD Ryzen Zen+ SoCs and with Thunderbolt 3 support removed), which is not doing good in terms of power efficiency goes, 10W idle… almost 20W when watching YouTube vids, I know that gotta be something wrong with my machine but I just don’t want to mess with it so I just decided to grab a new one.
And AMD laptops in my pov… at least till Zen 3, have a shitty power management stuff, I know it’s OEM’s fault but I don’t want to tackle all this shit so I went for Intel machine this time, even 8th gen would do.
And one part that play a huge role during my previous acquisition decisions is that GPU should be somehow nice, which no longer matters anymore since I quit PC gaming stuff a long time ago, and even if theres a need, for Minecraft I either use my M4 Mac mini or my Intel B580 rig or just anything else, at least it will works on most of my machines.

How do it feels like, is it good?

Really worth it, at least for now, power efficiency wise ofc It can’t compete with those crazy ARM chips or modern x86-64 socs, but being something from 7 yrs ago it’s something to be respect of, and having a 57Wh battery on board… just crazy

And it’s light weight, which fits my standards, and now maybe 14 inch laptops could be acceptable after this pull it off so nicely done.

What will you use if for?

Mostly blog writing I guess, or anything that require a use of *nix based systems that is not macOS, or simple net surfing.

For media comsumptions, still heading back to my Macs… which have much better speakers and handy AirPods connetivity.

Pretty nice purchase I gotta say(sad thing for my M4 MacBook Air because this laptop further squashed it’s use).

Tho I will still only do homework stuff on it since it had all the MS Office stuff and fancy fonts that I need to use and collabration tools and shitty software that only macOS could handle it properly(Yes and by that I mean most chinese apps I have to use).

Let’s see how all this holds up in the long run I guess?
entry.summary: Never ever gonna buy AMD laptops again.

entry.title: The Shitty Trip to Hong Kong Organized by school. DAY 1

link.title: The Shitty Trip to Hong Kong Organized by school. DAY 1

entry.content:
CONtext

So I got lucky enough to grab this chance to “study”/”tour” around HKU for two days plus a night staying at an hotel, all FREE.
I wasn’t seeking for this “rare” chance tbh, since I had a lot of chance to visit Hong Kong, so I was like “lmao it gotta have some huge red flags behind that”, which is true.
Tho after one of my friend said “hey they require some sort of English proficiency, you could give it a try.” so I sign up and yeah… thats how I got here, typing this rant on a resturant table after continious shit shows and my Concerta starting wear itself off, FURIOUS REALLY.
So now I am pack with tons of strangers, forced to interact with them, albeit i didn’t do much tho lol.

The before hand.

So before the “tour” we need to grab a Entry Permit to Hong Kong ofc, since we’re from a huge major world power but I can’t access a part of my proud country freely, albeit I actually support that scheme… and know why this is the case, but still rather annoying, not the policy, but the ppl came from down from villages asking how to grab a EP, which type, and I was like can’t you guys just ref to the school guidence?
So anyway, after all us lucky ass grabbo the Entry Permit, went to a meeting about the trip that’s about to set to happen in the vaguest word possible, and most annoyingly you soon realized this is more of a media PR trip than an actuall trip to learn/experience, and you are the guys to be under the spotlight.

For instance, you need to wear that stupid low quality T-shirt 24*7 lmao, and they all assume all men should wear 2XL, and all women wear L… and me and my dormmate be like: …fine

And you know what’s the most outragerous thing? They took your Travel Documents away to keep them “for” you, “to prevent someone lost it in the process”, ughhh…

Okay and theres your team work stuff, basically you need to work with a tons of strangers on something stupid that I will talk about later.

On-the-Set.

Although the Checkpoint we will be crossing is like physically right across my house for a 5mins walk, but they still ask me join at school so I can’t leave on Friday for home.

And guess what is the first thing we do? Taking silly pictures of course, for PR of course! Even videos.
And that will be the vide for the next 36hrs.

Get on a bus and we set off.

The first leg: HKU CYM Canteen with random food… and some touring

/PLACEHOLDER FOR PICS OF FOOD/

You have no choice, pull a ticket and call it your food, I still have some faith in CYM Canteen, but just the fact that I don’t have a choice so idk, maybe I will try it again when I go to HKU with my own foot next time.

It was so spicy and I need something to drink, and they won’t allow you to get out and return in 2mins just to grab something refreshing off the Swire Coca Cola vends, NOPE.
And I have to promise I will be back with my backpack look after by them, and return with-in 2mins, which I did.
So we set off for a tour in the school by a somewhat alumni related to our school and now studying in HKU, i guess.
Just a complete waste of time tho, not her fault, by our schools’ fault, those teachers from our school kept suggesting stupid things and always asking us to line up like we’re some soldiers from the Soviets during Afghan-Soviet War (feel sad for them tho).

Course ONE, the Metaverse shit but on Roblox as well… ughh…

So we took this class lectured by a idk PhD of Data Science in HKU, for a topic I will just laugh about at, and her English accent was straight out bad, even for SEA English or Hong Kong English, even I could barely understand what the hell she was trying to talk about, and everything she saids, from my guessing, translated from Cantonese to English in her head so the logic is still rather… Chinese, you get the vibe, tldr, not being a Chinese/Cantonese user you won’t be able to understand it.

Quite funny enough tho, I played Touhou on that PC so… whatever, and Extreme Tux Racer.

DINNER COURSE

Nothing to write home about… just normal Cantonese Resturant serving Dim Sun during the day serving dinner…
After a EXHAUSTING day it just taste so good I have nothing to complain about.

Victoria Harbor on that Tsim Sha Tsui side that are suppose to be located “Right next to HKU Campus” according to an idiot, and the subsequent shitty “survey” we need to conduct.

Right after the dinner we hopped onto the bus, again. We are now heading to Tsim Sha Tsui, that according to some specific tour guide, is “just a few minutes drive from here”, remember that we’re still in Sai Wan (aka 500m away from liason office) at this point, an I was like: Sure…

And I am lazy to descibe what we did there but in brief: Annoying College Student being force to conduct field surveys and ofc I did nothing.

Set off to hotel is the only option now to call it a day.

Hotel

Kinda nice no complaints, albeit I have to share a double bed room with another stranger in the group albeit not all that of a stranger but still a stranger so whatever.
At least now I could just lie on bed and watch BBC World and NHK World Japan and ABC via satellite after a quick shower, ofc why not, which is ever better.

Any conclusions of the day?

Nope, I write the last 50% of this JOURNAL a whole week later and you could see why, exhausting as hell, boring, and the fact that I really hate for being treat like an idiot.

I spent like almost 3 days after this mostly in sleep mode albeit ofc I still attended class but just sleep on the class which is something that I mostly refuse to do but I am so sleepy I can’t…

There will be an Day 2 on this but for now, let’s call it Day 1 done, as a record.
entry.summary: Being treated as a dumb ass is no fun, and why is "Metaverse" and "Web3" and "NFTs" still a thing...

entry.title: Like can all you guys stop assuming that I use your favorite TikTok/Douyin or AI or Rednote?

link.title: Like can all you guys stop assuming that I use your favorite TikTok/Douyin or AI or Rednote?

entry.content:
Can you guys cut it? Not all ppl are the same.

Sure I get it, most of the morons around me use it, and got addicted to it, like 12hrs of social media a day with endless doomscrolling, and end your day with a nice touch of fresh LLM/”AI” generated homework and powerpoints and scripts that smells and looks just like what LLM would do and have no shame on it.
Sure, our society have been fallen into a states where that these activities, not only is something NORMAL to do, but also something EVERYONE SHOULD DO.

But I want to say that, I ain’t your normal normie dude and won’t keep quite about this.

Like I swear to god, every single time, when some teachers just assume me, or me and them, to ask any questions with LLMs, I cringe.
Where’s the good old SEARCH ENGINES, I knew most chinese web search are crap, but learn how to use the classic internet please. And btw I knew that definition without the need of searching, I read that type of crap everyday. And oh, you guys always trash talk about Wikipedia for not reliable, just head to the references sections you idiot! Where’s the good old cross referencing to check if this is true?
I know, you teacher were being ask to follow the trend, but not all of the students sitting down here are idiots, I don’t think I am smart either but at least I know how to read a single news from several diffrent sources to get the closest truth. I know how to read a academic paper, I know how to summarize a thing on my own, and reading things is a pleasure for me, an actual leisure activity of me.

Every single time when someone just handed me something quick and dirty by LLMs, I cringe.
Like why the heck, but whatever you do what you do.

Every single time when someone, ask me, “you didn’t know this trend? it’s hot on douyin now”, I cringe.
Not everyone wants to be a mindless zombie floating around the shitty phone app that was design to try steal every last drop of blood and time in your life, in the process of earning all the money you have.

Every single time when someone say some trendy words, I cringe.
Disgusting. And just a zombie formed by the Marketing Experts from those evil corps selling useless craps.

And one funny thing I’ve notice was that, some were blamming others’ mental illness due to social media caused self-awearness(tbh theres none), or “exposure” of a disease, but the funny things is, those blames are mostly coming from those that loves to swip social media for sickness related content, just not on mental illness side of things. And besides, not everyone use social media, again.
Recent examples incl. ADHD/ASD and Depressions stuff.
Me being Hospital diagnosed AuDHD and Bipolar Type II and Sleeping Disorder patient that takes a lot of medications to stay alive and well that make you dizzy and headache all day not using Social Media like an addict and hate all those who brag them on social media be like: Can you guys just stop presuming?

entry.title: I’ve almost forgot how boring college life could be, and now I’ve found it back again.

link.title: I’ve almost forgot how boring college life could be, and now I’ve found it back again.

entry.content:
Yet another boring day at school

So sure, it has been three days since this term had started, and yet I’ve got nothing to do, like at all.
I got classes from 8am to 5.30pm today, and I am writing this during the last class of the day and it’s boring as hell this class btw.
And I’ve also got those kinda class that blame on victims as if they are the one that started all this crap. And I just wireguard-ed back to home and play with my Proxmox VE and ignore all the propagandas, and I still ignored her even when she knocked on the desk I was sitting on for me using laptops during class lmfao.
Oh and ughh the whole shit about classmate relationship

Updates from the future: It got fix somehow.
entry.summary: How could it be so boring...

entry.title: Made my brain spins, and here are the results.

link.title: Made my brain spins, and here are the results.

entry.content:
I hate going to school…

I am typing this on my beloved 23.8 inch 4K HiDPI display with my Mac mini which means… I am sitting in the dorm right now.
The worst things is not that I have to wake up at 7am every morning in the next 4mos which I am actually okay about…
But those propaganda classes… fine… fuck it…

That asides,
just watch me. - famous Canadian PM quote.

My mental health.

Improving… is the best word to describe it.
Like taking Lithiums makes me feel really dizzy, and sleepy, but at least it did get things under control, and taking Methylphenidate as prescribed does combat some of those side effects out, but as a general side effect, you ended up becoming really tired at the end of the day, sure is a pro since I got sleeping disorders but still, everyday you feels like a empty hull wandering around just to get things done.
Just hope those shit won’t hit again, I hope… I prob need to ask for some breaks from time to time, I am sorry homeroom teacher.

Should start my works on Japanese…

At least grab a JLPT N4 as a proof of concept.

Just Cope with it.

I hope so.
And maybe building that weather satellite earth station is a good idea to work on.
Just I need to pull an CAT-5e from roof to home, kinda crazy.

Wraps up

Da Sind Wir Aber Immer Noch

(I know but as a “I LOVE MYSELF” view point, and it’s a good song why not, if you don’t look at that populist lyrics its fine.)
entry.summary: Da Sind Wir Aber Immer Noch.

entry.title: Recent affairs and projects that are under the way.

link.title: Recent affairs and projects that are under the way.

entry.content:
The Sun is back on the horizon, again, and I finally saw a chance to live in the way I want, again.

I reckon my parents finally realized how their ignorance have cause me to be like this.
So they aplogized, which I did not ask for one, since I don’t really think they did all that on purpose, or more like the root of all this is due to the fact that they never had a purpose, just do it as is, without a plan, so thats okay.
But still there are tons of things we don’t disagree with each other but now the gate has finally been opened, I have all the freedom to work my way out with my own effort ofc.
So I reckon I could say it with confidence that Study Abroad project has been resumed, and I will spent the next semister continue working on those things that lays down the way for that.

I actually had a great idea about what should I research on.

I am still working my way up to get that god damn bachelor’s degree. But after I talked to (the best) doctor (in the world, yes you, if you are reading this, just wanna say thanks for actually caring me and actually remember that I made a promise almost a month back, so thanks!), which she shared some interesting things that happened around her and after listened about it(sorry I might looks like wasn’t paying attention but was actually thinking about it)

I reckon one of the research I could do was like: How social media affects China's younger generation's thoughts on LGBT+ and how it became a forbidden trend, the history about LGBT+ communities in the 21st centries China and it's potential unwanted affects for becoming a trend. (The unwanted affects incl. increased stereotypes/misunderstanding from the general public, causing deeper conflics in those LGBT+ related families, and attracting those individuals that came out because it’s a trend thats “cool”).

I will cover both sides of the view and I reckon most of the research would be pointing fingers at the exotic internet enviorment here in China and Douyin(aka TikTok).
Idk if someone see this and have thoughts about this feel free to send email for me.
The hardest part of this is that how to execute the research, or how to proof this is real, where should I gather data to proof those things I know?
It’s long way ahead, but at least its much more interesting, and is actually something I want to do.

Back to school soon.

Let’s hope I could get my mental health intact this time…
Ughh idk what to say now, just waiting for dinner. See ya next post, as always.
entry.summary: Lazy updating but I was doing fine, for the most part.

entry.title: I am such a loser tbh.

link.title: I am such a loser tbh.

entry.content:
The pals around me or at least the ones that are still willing to talks to me be like:

  • Mostly on their way of grabbing Master degree in some very well known colleges, you know the drill.
  • Study things that they choose or they love about.
  • Really good at things they do.
  • 100% support from families.
  • There parents somehow got a plan long ago but well executed
  • Idk why they are still williing to talk to me, I am such a loser anyway.

Comparing with …

Me living a loser life:

  • Didn’t went to an actual high school. Went to Vocational High instead.
  • Struggled in a Vacational College(unless you win big, other wise losers place), and somehow able to struggled out to a better one that could botain BA.
  • Struggle to even obtain an Bachelor’s degree after all these years.
  • Really bad at things that I needs to do.
  • 20% Family support only in cash and only when they think you are doing what they think you should, and they tbh don’t know what should do either. and otherwise (most of the time) 0%.
  • Parents got a plan, but they don’t know should they with it mid-road or got distracted by sth else or even “you shouldn’t let your kids do that” plus they revealed that I am sort of under the rainbow flag and ceased any plans that could get me to a better place.
  • Rotten at home.

TLDR.

I LOSE. ALREADY, AND I KNEW IT LONG AGO. I hope things will get slightly better… I know that might not look good but at this point it looks like my only way out.
entry.summary: Just shut up, I just want to be better, is that a crime?

entry.title: Turns out it’s already mid-Feb 2026…
entry.content:
Wait what? It’s this time already?

For fuck sake I got less than 2-weeks worth of winter break left… one of the reason why I hate having Chinese Lunar New Year this year is the fact that like it hit and then I go to school in Feb.28 which is no fun.
I mean sure it’s because the LNY this year is too late… usually having it by the early Feb or later Jan, nope not this year, and got no winter break extentions for that, like I got a week to enjoy the vide(of sleeping with meal prepping noises) and then I should be at school to do all those shit stuff.
Oh which reminds me before all that I should hit hospital or sth, since I just don’t really break the one-month-one-train-ride biz cauz train fares between some city and another city is too expensive and exhausting… spending 2hrs standing on subway/metro trains and 1hrs on not-all-that-fast Intercity-Express is no fun.
I will be back on late-March for that yellow lil pills but oh well fine. And I am ready to switch from Stilnox/Myslee, gosh I really have enough taking it, last nights sleeps was fine tho, albeit the dreams are still pretty darn weird but hey at least no nightmares that night I guess? But still I am on it for way too long.
Don’t forgot to take that Lithium, otherwise your brain will get you on your knees again, thanks BD.
And remember I should stand firm on my behalf and on my own values and my own interests, my priorities comes first.
Anyway… it gotta be a tough year. I knew it…

Addressing the “What’s next?” vide in the room

Idk… maybe I will work my way out, or maybe dying in the process, I have no idea, and I won’t make any bold statements like “if I killed myself it’s not my intention”(albeit this kms thoughts could be trace all the way back to 2014) becauz I don’t want anyone using this to press me saying that I don’t really want to put an end to this.
I did want to put an end to this, when all the things just got really boring. Like they always like to tell me things like “You shouldn’t knew that much” or “You live painful because you knew too much” but the thing is according to you guys, I only have this chance to live as a human, why not chasing for something greater and even more funny than that is if I choose to listen to yours thoughts about “just live a normal live” I would soon be compared against those better ones.
But nope they still don’t want me to do things that could makes me chase a better life. I am somehow still being jailed by my parents and families.
And oh btw, not being a pure ass fool is a crime now?? how? you guys told me to learn so I learnt.
So I reckon that my “If I can’t do it I will kms” stuff is legit.
Ughh, idk what I was talking about… Idk if there’s any logic innit.

Maybe I will kms only if I wrote a suicide note that’s okay for you to read and is the one that you would be tearful about.

That music I love to listen.

Reminder

Valentine’s Day is not a public holiday in Lemon Republic.
So I choose staying at home today.
entry.summary: And I had done nothing other than sleeping.

entry.title: The Yuri Specialist just announced that They got nothing to read in this long day.

link.title: The Yuri Specialist just announced that They got nothing to read in this long day.

entry.content:
uConsole NVMe Upgrade Kit

So I bought this.
uConsole Upgrade Kit - Adding NVMe SSD/RJ45 Ethernet/ USB 3.0/AC1200 WiFi
As the title suggest, now I got NVMe SSD and RJ45 GbE and two USB3.0 outta my Raspberry Pi CM5 in that uConsole.
I didn’t expected it to work that well but it did, and because of the fact that I currently don’t have any BIGG NVMe SSD around so I put in a 16GB Optane M10 for swap that I probably never going to use instead.
1-lane PCIe 2.0 sometimes could be up to 3.0? works at nice snappy speed w/o a prob.
The RJ-45 was pulled directly from RP1 southbridge onboard CM5 which is connected to the SoC via 4-lanes of PCIe 2.0, ran great with full-speed GbE(I tested that already).
USB3.0? Haven’t tried that yet but useful later.
At least thats 1 more USB-A onboard the uConsole. And plus a USB-C 3.0 idk could I charge it on that or not yet prob not.
And funny enough it somehow blew my M4 MacBook Air outta the water on some tasks except actual computing that requires a bigger screen and better keyboard and better performance and better battery, uC is enough for my RTL-SDR anyway.(Oh my somehow failed yet on the way Satellite recv project)
Tbh with you I could hardly fill that 4GB RAM on my CM5, I can’t imagine me filling up that M10 in swap, my whole system currently took up 12GB on my SDCard so… But swap on a drive like M10 does somehow extend the life of that SDCard I reckon.
Anyway just enjoying fun on my uConsole.

I am out of things to read…

Right before the Lunar New Year I am already bored. 20hrs after recovered from that depressive period and I rushed to do something else new, I am already out of things to do, or even to read, I was wandering through yamibo for stuff to read while waiting all my favourite novels to update, which is bored, I didn’t sleep well last night, and after waking up at 8am I decided fine I gotta wake up and live a day, turns out to be a pretty boring day, my grandparents and my aunt are making living noises that almost driven me crazy, but that ain’t their fault, just ah fine some part of that was their fault for being too loud, and me being to easy to get disrupt and distract, but whatever.

And remember that I said I gotta watch Haibane Renmei last time? Well after watching two EPs straight during midnight I reckon I don’t have the guts to continue watching it like many other anime I’ve downloaded, might take a while for me to re-enter this, just because like kinda not at the right mood to watch that? I mean not this time, later time(like how I dealt with that anime talks about supposed Introvert Pink Hair Japanese Otaku Girl with her five/six wives anime, someone loves to compares between me and her and I was like bro you gotta be kidding I got my gender wrong for that, and if I was her, I would go and have 10 waifus instead.)

But yep. nothing to do now, maybe rewatch old anime(old means I first watched it a long time ago), notable examples incl. Lucky Star, Serial Experiments Lain, Haruhi Suzumiya 2006, etc…
No HyouKa, since that is a piece of shit that talks about some idiotic high schoolers circlejerking on their circlejerking skills(e.g. how good they “Investigate stuff”).
And no Liz and the Blue Bird since after I got the BD on hand I’ve watched it for like a billion times already, but being a Yuri Specialist My soul is always ready for this kind of top tier Yuri/Lesbian contents.

About that Q&A I had today

I really don’t like someone ask me this question:
Q: When can you stop taking those pills?
A: Only when doctor say yes.

Anyway, I am a bit tired after dinner, good night, and I should take my pills btw.

Good night, and see you next post.
entry.summary: But at least I got a Optane M10 16GB NVMe drive inside my uConsole up and running.
